TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sqbwh ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 11 buwan, 30 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 28 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 80%, binah lihuyan s'uli 13%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Sqbwh hya' ga Kalan dalah. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕqβwħ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu tajto ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕqβwħ ħjaʔ ɣa kalan *alaħ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sqbwh ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 11 buwan, 30 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 28 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 80%, binah lihuyan s'uli 13%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Sqbwh hya' ga Kalan dalah. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕqβwħ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu tajto ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕqβwħ ħjaʔ ɣa kalan *alaħ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
